
{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description= Before its previous owner, the Shadow Duke, passed away, the Snail Shell didn't look like this. Its look changed when the Shadow Duke was killed by congealed blood. The duke's last thought was that maybe he shouldn't have sucked the congealed blood but ketchup.
|affct=FAME
|hard=HP
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=3541
|relic1=Blood of Dracula
|relic2=Supersoldier Serum
|relic3=Double Helix DNA
|relic4=Origin of Species
|relic5=Gene Map
}}
|color=blue
|earth=3
|water=3
|fire=4
|wind=4
|form=Zombie
|element=Wind
|realm=Bharata
|orangehard=ATK
}}
